title: caprifolium standishii
intro: Caprifolium standishii, also known as the Japanese honeysuckle, is a climbing woody vine native to East Asia that belongs to the Caprifoliaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Caprifolium standishii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Caprifolium standishii is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
